title: Tirišano le Ntwa Mollwaneng wa Kapa
subject: History
caps_topic: Cooperation and conflict on the frontiers of the Cape Colony in the early 19th century

slides.eyebrow: Histori ya Kreiti 7 - Legato la Senior
slides.title: Tirišano le Ntwa Mollwaneng wa Kapa
slides.lead: Kamoo ditšhaba tša Xhosa, ba-trekboer (balemi ba dikgomo ba Maburu), Maisimane le baromiwa ba kereke ba ilego ba kopana, ba gwebišana gomme ba lwa mollwaneng wa Kapa Bohlabela mathomong a bo-1800.

media.alt: Noka e tala e phulaganya magareng ga dinaga tše pedi, e nngwe e nago le dikgomo gomme e nngwe e nago le koloi, di kopana mollwaneng.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 320 180' role='img'><rect width='320' height='180' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect y='118' width='320' height='62' fill='#c8b89a'/><path d='M0 118 L60 96 L120 112 L180 90 L250 110 L320 92 L320 118 Z' fill='#7a8b5a'/><path d='M150 40 q10 40 -6 70 q-14 26 4 70' fill='none' stroke='#4a6d8c' stroke-width='7' stroke-linecap='round'/><circle cx='250' cy='44' r='22' fill='#e8a13a'/><ellipse cx='60' cy='138' rx='12' ry='7' fill='#5c3a22'/><rect x='214' y='128' width='34' height='14' fill='#7a5a3a'/><circle cx='220' cy='146' r='5' fill='#3a2a1a'/><circle cx='242' cy='146' r='5' fill='#3a2a1a'/></svg>

slides.notes: Bea seemo: 'mollwane' ga se fela mothaladi mmapeng, ke lefelo le legolo moo ditšhaba tše di fapafapanego di dulago kgauswi, ka dinako tše dingwe di thušana gomme ka tše dingwe di lwa. Hlaloša gore karolo ye e lebelela mollwane wa Kapa Bohlabela mathomong a bo-1800, kgauswi le Noka ye Kgolo ya Fish (Great Fish River). Botšiša barutwana gore ba nagana gore go direga eng ge dihlopha tše pedi di nyaka naga le meetse a swanago.

slides.title: Mollwane wa Kapa Bohlabela
slides.lead: Ka 1800 Kapa Colony e be e phatlaletše go ya bohlabela go fihlela balemi ba Madatšhe ba kopana le ditšhaba tša Xhosa kgauswi le Noka ye Kgolo ya Fish.

blocks.text: **Kapa Colony** e thomile e le bodulo bja Madatšhe (Maburu a Dutch) kua Table Bay ka 1652. Mo mengwageng ye e fetago 150, balemi ba dikgomo bao ba bitšwago **trekboer** ba ile ba huduga go ya bohlabela ba nyaka naga ya go fula. Ka 1795, gape le ka 1806, **Borithane (Britain)** e ile ya tšea taolo ya Kapa.

items: Lefelo la mollwane le be le le nageng ye lehono e bitšwago Kapa Bohlabela, kgauswi le Noka ye Kgolo ya Fish.
E be e se mollwane wo o tiilego - o be o šutha ge batho ba huduga gomme dintwa di lwewa.
Dihlopha tše di fapafapanego di ile tša abelana, tša phadišana le go lwela naga le meetse a swanago.

media.alt: Mmapa wo bonolo wo o bontšhago Kapa Colony ka bodikela le naga ya Xhosa ka bohlabela, di aroganywa ke Noka ye Kgolo ya Fish.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect x='10' y='20' width='104' height='120' fill='#c8b89a'/><rect x='126' y='20' width='104' height='120' fill='#7a8b5a'/><path d='M120 18 q-8 40 4 62 q10 22 -4 62' fill='none' stroke='#4a6d8c' stroke-width='6'/><text x='30' y='84' font-family='sans-serif' font-size='11' fill='#3a2a1a'>Cape</text><text x='24' y='98' font-family='sans-serif' font-size='11' fill='#3a2a1a'>Colony</text><text x='150' y='84' font-family='sans-serif' font-size='11' fill='#243318'>Xhosa</text><text x='152' y='98' font-family='sans-serif' font-size='11' fill='#243318'>land</text></svg>

slides.notes: Bea mollwane mo lefelong le nakong go barutwana. Šupa mmapeng go Kapa Bohlabela le Noka ye Kgolo ya Fish. Gatelela gore mollwane o be o dula o šutha go ya bohlabela ge colony e gola. Ela hloko phetogo go tloga taolong ya Madatšhe go ya go ya Borithane, seo se bego se le bohlokwa ka gobane Borithane e tliša badudi ba baswa le melao ye meswa mollwaneng.

slides.title: Ke bomang bao ba bego ba dula mollwaneng?
slides.lead: Dihlopha tše mmalwa di ile tša abelana lefelo la mollwane, se sengwe le se sengwe se na le tsela ya sona ya bophelo.

blocks.heading: Ditšhaba tša Xhosa
blocks.text: Balemi ba go ruta dikgomo bao ba bego ba dula ka merafeng ka bohlabela bja Noka ya Fish, ba etwa pele ke dikgoši tša go swana le Ngqika le Ndlambe.

blocks.heading: Ba-trekboer
blocks.text: Balemi ba dikgomo ba go bolela Sedatšhe bao ba tlogago Kapa ba hudugela bohlabela ba nyaka naga ye mpsha ya go fula.

blocks.heading: Ma-Khoikhoi le Ma-San
blocks.text: Badiši le batsomi ba pele ba selete, ba bantši bja bona ga bjale ba šoma dipolaseng tša bokoloniale goba ba dula gare ga Maxhosa.

blocks.heading: Maisimane le baromiwa ba kereke
blocks.text: Bahlankedi ba Borithane, mašole le Badudi ba 1820, gammogo le baromiwa ba kereke bao ba tlilego go ruta le go sokolla batho.

slides.notes: Fa barutwana lenaneo la baanegwa pele kanegelo e thoma. Gatelela gore Maxhosa e be e le balemi ba nago le tshepedišo ya setšhaba le ya sepolotiki ye e tiilego, e sego fela batho ba go 'thibela tsela' ya badudi. Ela hloko gore batho ba Khoikhoi le San ba be ba šetše ba le fao pele ga dihlopha ka bobedi. Efoga go bontšha sehlopha se sengwe le se sengwe se le se sebotse ka moka goba se sebe ka moka.

slides.title: Go gwebišana le go dula mmogo
slides.lead: Bontši bja nako, batho ba mollwane ba be ba šomišana ka gobane ba be ba nyakana.

blocks.text: Bophelo mollwaneng e be e se fela bja go lwa. Ditšhaba tša Xhosa le bakoloniale ba be ba **gwebišana**, ba ananišana dikgomo, meno a tlou, dipheta, koporo, lešela le didirišwa tša tšhipi. Batho ba bangwe ba ile ba ithuta maleme a bona, ba šoma mmogo gomme go bile le manyalo magareng ga dihlopha.

items: Dikgomo e be e le lehumo go balemi ba Xhosa le ba-trekboer, ka fao ba be ba gwebišana gomme ba diša mmogo.
Bašomi, batsomi le bagwebi ba Khoikhoi gantši ba be ba sepela magareng ga metse ye mebedi.
Baromiwa ba kereke, dikgoši le bahlankedi ka dinako tše dingwe ba be ba dira ditumelelano tša go boloka khutšo.

media.alt: Diatla tše pedi di ananišana dilo ka godimo ga dikgomo tše pedi, di bontšha kgwebo.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 220 160' role='img'><rect width='220' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M40 60 q30 -20 60 0' fill='none' stroke='#7a5a3a' stroke-width='9' stroke-linecap='round'/><path d='M120 60 q30 -20 60 0' fill='none' stroke='#2f5233' stroke-width='9' stroke-linecap='round'/><circle cx='110' cy='58' r='10' fill='#e8a13a'/><ellipse cx='70' cy='118' rx='22' ry='12' fill='#5c3a22'/><ellipse cx='150' cy='118' rx='22' ry='12' fill='#8a6a44'/><path d='M52 108 q-6 -10 4 -12 M88 108 q6 -10 -4 -12' stroke='#3a2a1a' stroke-width='3' fill='none'/></svg>

slides.notes: Slaete ye e leka-lekanya kanegelo gore barutwana ba se nagane gore mollwane e be e le wa dintwa fela. Dikamano tša nnete - kgwebo, mošomo, lenyalo, go ithuta maleme - di be di sepela mollwaneng. 'Tirišano' ye ke seripa se sengwe sa sehlogo sa CAPS gomme e bonolo go se lebelela. Botšiša barutwana mehlala ya sebjalebjale ya dihlopha tšeo di phadišanago le go šomišana ka bobedi.

slides.title: Ke ka lebaka la eng ntwa e ilego ya gola?
slides.lead: Dilo tšona tšeo batho ba bego ba di abelana - naga, meetse le dikgomo - le tšona di ile tša baka dikgohlano.

blocks.text: Ge ba-trekboer ba bantši le morago badudi ba Borithane ba fihla, ba be ba nyaka **naga** le **mafulo** a mantši. Se se ile sa gatelela ditšhaba tša Xhosa tšeo di bego di šetše di šomiša naga yeo. Ge dikgomo di timela, lehlakore le lengwe le le lengwe le be le bea molato go le lengwe, gomme dihlakola tše nnyane di be di ka gola tša ba ntwa.

items: Dihlopha ka bobedi di be di ruta dikgomo, ka fao phadišano ka naga ya mafulo e be e le ka mehla.
Go utswa dikgomo ka mahlakore ka bobedi go ile gwa baka kgalefo le go se tshepane.
Mmušo wa bokoloniale o be o dula o leka go bea mollwane wo o tiilego le go tloša Maxhosa nageng ya ka bodikela bja wona.

media.alt: Kgomo bogareng le mesebe ye mebedi e gogela ka mathlakore a a fapanego, di bontšha phadišano.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 220 160' role='img'><rect width='220' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><ellipse cx='110' cy='84' rx='30' ry='18' fill='#7a5a3a'/><path d='M92 70 q-6 -10 4 -12 M128 70 q6 -10 -4 -12' stroke='#3a2a1a' stroke-width='4' fill='none'/><path d='M64 84 L20 84 M28 76 L20 84 L28 92' fill='none' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='6' stroke-linecap='round' stroke-linejoin='round'/><path d='M156 84 L200 84 M192 76 L200 84 L192 92' fill='none' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='6' stroke-linecap='round' stroke-linejoin='round'/></svg>

slides.notes: Bontšha sebaki-le-mafelelo gabotse: palo ye e golago ya badudi gammogo le ekonomi ya dikgomo yeo e abelanwago le mollwane wo o šuthago di ile tša tliša ntwa. Šupa gore go utswa dikgomo go be go direga ka mahlakore ka bobedi - se se bohlokwa go toka. Hlaloša gore maiteko a mmušo a go thala mothaladi wo o tiilego, le go boloka Maxhosa ka lehlakore le tee la wona, a dirile gore khutšo e be thata.

slides.title: Dintwa tša Mollwane (Frontier Wars)
slides.lead: Magareng ga 1779 le 1879 go bile le tatelano ya dintwa magareng ga bakoloniale le ditšhaba tša Xhosa mollwaneng wa Kapa Bohlabela.

blocks.text: Bo-radihistori ba bala **dintwa tša mollwane tše senyane (9)** mo mengwageng e ka bago lekgolo. Karolong ye re lebelela tšeo di diregilego **mathomong a bo-1800**. Ntwa ye nngwe le ye nngwe gantši e be e fela ka Maxhosa a lahlegelwa ke naga ye ntši, ge colony e kgorometša mollwane wa yona go ya pele bohlabela.

items: Dintwa tše di bile di bitšwa Dintwa tša Mollwane wa Kapa goba Dintwa tša Xhosa.
E be e se ntwa e tee ye telele eupša e le dikgohlano tše mmalwa tša go arogana, tša na le khutšo magareng.
Ka nako, mokgwa o be o le molaleng: naga e be e šutha go tloga taolong ya Xhosa ya ya go colony.

media.alt: Mollwane wa colony wo o šupilwego ka mothaladi wa dikutwana, o gata go ya go la go ja ka nako.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect x='10' y='30' width='60' height='100' fill='#c8b89a'/><rect x='70' y='30' width='40' height='100' fill='#cbb98f' opacity='0.7'/><rect x='110' y='30' width='40' height='100' fill='#cfc094' opacity='0.5'/><line x1='70' y1='24' x2='70' y2='136' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='3' stroke-dasharray='6 5'/><line x1='110' y1='24' x2='110' y2='136' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='3' stroke-dasharray='6 5'/><line x1='150' y1='24' x2='150' y2='136' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='3' stroke-dasharray='6 5'/><path d='M74 20 L146 20 M138 14 L146 20 L138 26' fill='none' stroke='#3a2a1a' stroke-width='3'/></svg>

slides.notes: Fa seswantšho se segolo pele ga dintlha. Barutwana ga ba nyake go gopola dintwa ka moka tše senyane; ba nyaka go kwešiša mokgwa - ntwa ye e boeletšwago, ntwa ye nngwe le ye nngwe e fela ka mollwane o kgorometšwa bohlabela le Maxhosa a lahlegelwa ke naga. [SME] Bo-radihistori ba fapana ka fao dintwa tše senyane di baletšwego le go beelwa datum ka gona; netefatša palo le datum tšeo o nyakago barutwana ba di šomiše.

slides.title: Go rakwa go tloga Zuurveld
slides.lead: Mašole a Borithane a ile a kgorometša Maxhosa a diketekete go tshela Noka ya Fish go phumola naga ya colony.

blocks.text: **Zuurveld** e be e le lefelo la naga ka bodikela bja Noka ya Fish moo Maxhosa le bakoloniale ba bego ba dula kgauswi le ka ntlhana. Ka 1811-1812, Mmušiši **Sir John Cradock** o ile a laela mašole a Borithane le baleagane ba wona go **raka Maxhosa** le go a gapeletša go ya bohlabela go tshela noka.

items: Colony e be e nyaka lefelo la thibelo le le se nago batho ka lehlakoreng la yona la bohlabela.
Go leta mollwane wo moswa, motse wa Grahamstown o ile wa hlolwa ka 1812.
Malapa a mantši a Xhosa a ile a lahlegelwa ke magae le naga ya mafulo yeo ba bego ba e šomiša mengwaga ye mentši.

media.alt: Batho ba nago le dikgomo ba šuthišwa go tshela noka ba lebile bohlabela.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M112 20 q-8 50 4 62 q10 20 -4 58' fill='none' stroke='#4a6d8c' stroke-width='8'/><g fill='#2f5233'><circle cx='150' cy='60' r='8'/><rect x='144' y='70' width='12' height='26'/><circle cx='178' cy='72' r='8'/><rect x='172' y='82' width='12' height='26'/></g><ellipse cx='196' cy='108' rx='16' ry='9' fill='#5c3a22'/><path d='M150 120 L200 120 M192 114 L200 120 L192 126' fill='none' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='5'/></svg>

slides.notes: Wo ke mohlala wo o kwagalago wa go amogwa naga. Hlaloša 'lefelo la thibelo (buffer zone)' - colony e be e nyaka naga ye e se nago batho magareng ga yona le Maxhosa. Ela hloko go hlolwa ga Grahamstown (lehono Makhanda) e le motse wa sešole wa mollwane. Swaragana le se ka tlhompho: malapa a nnete a ile a gapeletšwa go tloga nageng ya bona. Botšiša barutwana gore ba nagana Maxhosa a ile a ikwa bjang ka go rakwa.

slides.title: Badudi ba Borithane ba 1820
slides.lead: Borithane e ile ya romela badudi ba ka bago 4 000 go tla dula mollwaneng e le kotsi ya go šireletša colony.

blocks.text: Ka 1820 mmušo wa Borithane o ile wa thuša badudi ba ka bago **4 000** go hudugela Kapa Bohlabela. Ba ile ba newa dipolase lefelong la mollwane, ka karolo go godiša colony le ka karolo go **šireletša mollwane** kgahlanong le Maxhosa.

items: Badudi ba bantši ba ile ba katana: naga e be e le thata go e lema gomme ntwa e be e le kgauswi.
Ba bangwe ba ile ba tlogela go lema gomme ba thoma metse, mešomo le dikuranta.
Go fihla ga bona go ile gwa oketša kgateletšo godimo ga naga ya Xhosa kgauswi le mollwane.

media.alt: Sekepe sa maotwana kgauswi le lebopo le koloi le ngwakwana o monnyane lebopong.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect y='104' width='240' height='56' fill='#c8b89a'/><rect y='92' width='240' height='14' fill='#a8bcae'/><g><rect x='40' y='58' width='6' height='40' fill='#5c3a22'/><path d='M46 60 L84 60 L64 96 L46 96 Z' fill='#efe6d2' stroke='#8a6a44'/><path d='M30 96 L96 96 L86 108 L40 108 Z' fill='#7a5a3a'/></g><rect x='150' y='96' width='40' height='24' fill='#b7a98d'/><path d='M148 96 L170 78 L192 96 Z' fill='#8a1f1f'/><rect x='165' y='104' width='10' height='16' fill='#5c3a22'/></svg>

slides.notes: Hlaloša leano la Borithane: go bea badudi mollwaneng go matlafatša le go o šireletša. Ela hloko gore badudi ba bantši ba bile le nako ye thata gomme ba retologela mešomong ya motse, se se hlolile kgolo ya Grahamstown le boraeprinta (dikuranta) tša mollwane. Boloka tekatekano: badudi gantši e be e le malapa a mahumanegi a tlwaelegilego, eupša go fihla ga bona go sa ntše go okeditše kgateletšo godimo ga naga ya Xhosa.

slides.title: Makhanda le tlhaselo ya Grahamstown
slides.lead: Ka 1819 mašole a Xhosa a etilwego pele ke moetapele wa ntwa le moprofeta Makhanda a ile a hlasela motse wa mollwane wa Grahamstown.

blocks.text: Maxhosa a be a arogantšwe magareng ga baetapele ba babedi, **Ngqika** le malomeagwe **Ndlambe**. Ge Borithane e thekga Ngqika, mašole a Ndlambe a ile a gana. Ka 1819 mohlabani-moprofeta **Makhanda** (yo a bego a bitšwa gape Nxele goba Makana) o ile a etela pele mašole a magolo a Xhosa tlhaselong ya sebete ya **Grahamstown**.

items: Tlhaselo e ile ya palelwa, gomme Maxhosa a lahlegelwa ke batho ba bantši.
Makhanda o ile a ineela gomme a golegwa Robben Island, moo a ilego a nwelela a leka go tšhaba.
Ka morago ga ntwa colony e ile ya tšea naga ye ntši le go feta, ya hlola lefelo la 'khutšo' leo Maxhosa a bego a sa kgone go tsena go lona.

media.alt: Motho o tee yo motelele a phahamiša lerumo a eme pele ga motse o monnyane wo o ageleditšwego.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect y='120' width='240' height='40' fill='#c8b89a'/><g fill='#b7a98d'><rect x='150' y='84' width='70' height='36'/><rect x='160' y='72' width='16' height='12'/><rect x='192' y='72' width='16' height='12'/></g><circle cx='60' cy='52' r='12' fill='#2f5233'/><rect x='54' y='66' width='12' height='40' fill='#2f5233'/><line x1='74' y1='30' x2='74' y2='108' stroke='#5c3a22' stroke-width='4'/><path d='M74 30 L70 44 L78 44 Z' fill='#7a7a7a'/></svg>

slides.notes: Hlaloša karogano magareng ga Ngqika le Ndlambe le kamoo go tsenela ga Borithane go ilego gwa tseneletša ntwa. Hlagiša Makhanda e le moetapele o bohlokwa le moprofeta, e sego fela mohlaseli. Go golegwa ga gagwe le lehu la gagwe Robben Island go mo dira sešupo sa mathomo sa go gana kgatelelo. Ela hloko gape mokgwa: ka morago ga ntwa, colony e ile ya tšea naga ye ntši. [SME] Bogolo bja mašole a Makhanda gantši bo bolelwa e le a ka bago 10 000; netefatša palo pele o e bolela go barutwana.

slides.title: Bathuši le karolo ya go fenya
slides.lead: Baromiwa ba kereke ba tlile go ruta le go sokolla - eupša mošomo wa bona le wona o ile wa bula tsela ya taolo ya bokoloniale.

items: Ba agile diteišene tša boromiwa, dikolo le dikereke.
Ba ngwadile leleme la Sexhosa gomme ba ruta go bala le go ngwala.
Ka dinako tše dingwe ba šireletša batho ba Afrika kgahlanong le tshwaro ye šoro.
Ba gateletše batho go lahla ditumelo le ditlwaelo tša bona.
Diteišene tša boromiwa gantši di ile tša ba mo maatla a bokoloniale a bego a ka thoma gona.
Dipego le dimmapa tša bona di ile tša thuša colony go kwešiša le go laola naga.

slides.notes: Baromiwa ba kereke ke mohlala o mobotse wa sehlogo sa 'tirišano le ntwa' se se raraganego. Dihlopha tša go swana le London Missionary Society (Ngaka Johannes van der Kemp, ka morago Ngaka John Philip) ka dinako tše dingwe di ile tša emela ditokelo tša Khoikhoi le Xhosa, eupša mošomo wa boromiwa le wona o ile wa fokotša boitaolo bja Maafrika gomme wa nolofatša katološo ya bokoloniale. Hlohleletša barutwana go swara dikgopolo tše pedi gatee go e na le go ahlola baromiwa e le ba babotse fela goba ba babe fela.

slides.title: Go bolawa ga Kgoši Hintsa
slides.lead: Ka 1835 Borithane e ile ya bolaya kgoši-kgolo ya Xhosa, Hintsa, nakong ya ntwa ka naga le dikgomo.

blocks.text: Ka 1834 ntwa e ile ya tsoga gape ge mašole a Xhosa, a befetšwe ke go lahlegelwa ke naga, a tsena ka colony. Nakong ya ntwa Borithane e ile ya swara **kgoši-kgolo Hintsa ka Phalo**. Ka Mei 1835 o ile a **thuntšhwa a bolawa ke mašole a Borithane** a sa le motšhwarwa, tiro ye e ilego ya tšhoša le go befediša Maxhosa.

items: Ntwa e ile ya baka tahlego ye kgolo ya maphelo le dikgomo ka mahlakore ka bobedi.
Lehu la Hintsa le ile la ba sešupo se se sa felego sa go se loke ga bokoloniale.
Colony e ile gape ya kgorometša mollwane wa yona bohlabela ka morago ga ntwa.

media.alt: Lerumo le robegilego le beilwe godimo ga kotse, letšatši le le tlase ka morago, le swaya lehu la moetapele.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M0 118 L240 118 L240 160 L0 160 Z' fill='#c8b89a'/><circle cx='120' cy='118' r='34' fill='#e0913a' opacity='0.6'/><ellipse cx='120' cy='96' rx='26' ry='40' fill='#5c3a22'/><ellipse cx='120' cy='96' rx='10' ry='30' fill='#efe6d2'/><line x1='70' y1='70' x2='104' y2='104' stroke='#7a7a7a' stroke-width='4'/><line x1='138' y1='118' x2='172' y2='150' stroke='#7a7a7a' stroke-width='4'/></svg>

slides.notes: Ye ke nako ye bothata - e swaraganeng ka tlhwaelo le ka mmakgonthe. Hintsa e be e le kgoši-kgolo ya Xhosa; go bolawa ga gagwe a sa le motšhwarwa go ile gwa lebelelwa e le go eka gomme go sa le histori ye e bohloko. Lebelela lebaka le se se bilego bohlokwa: se ile sa tseneletša go gana ga Xhosa le go se tshepane. Efoga dintlha tše šoro; ntlha ye kgolo ke go se loke le moriti wa gona wo motelele. [SME] Maemo a nnete a lehu la Hintsa le go ripša ga gagwe a ngangišanwa ke bo-radihistori; boloka pego ya ka phaphošing ya borutelo e šireletšegile gomme o netefatše mantšu.

slides.title: Moetapele yo a lwetšego go boloka naga
slides.lead: Kgoši Maqoma o ile a etela pele go gana ga Xhosa mengwaga ye mentši gomme a hwa e le motšhwarwa Robben Island.

blocks.text: Naga e be e le ya rena, gomme le ka mohla re ka se kgone go tlogela go ikwa gore e ile ya tšewa go rena.
blocks.cite: Moya wo o gopolwago wa go gana ga Xhosa mollwaneng

blocks.text: **Maqoma**, morwa wa Kgoši Ngqika, e be e le yo mongwe wa baetapele ba sešole ba Xhosa ba go tseba kudu dintweng tša mollwane. O ile a rakwa nageng ya gagwe lefelong la Kat River gomme a fetša bontši bja bophelo bja gagwe a gana katološo ya bokoloniale. Ka morago o ile a golegwa **Robben Island**, moo a hwilego gona ka 1873.

items: O ile a šomiša meboto le sethokgwa sa mollwane ka bohlale kgahlanong le mašole a magolo.
Bophelo bja gagwe bo bontšha theko ya batho ya go lahlegelwa ke naga, leboelela.
Lehono o gopolwa e le mogale wa go gana kgatelelo.

slides.notes: Maqoma o fa barutwana motho yo a gopolwago yo a tiišetšago sehlogo sa go gana le go amogwa naga. Ela hloko gore temana ye ke poeletšo ye e swarago maikutlo a Xhosa a tahlego, e sego temana ya mmakgonthe ye e netefaditšwego - e hlagiše bjalo. Kgokaganya go golegwa ga gagwe Robben Island le Makhanda pele, go bontšha molokwane wo motelele wa baetapele ba go gana bao ba bego ba swaretšwe fao. [SME] Netefatša gore o phuthologile go šomiša temana ye e poeleditšwego, goba o e tšee ka ye e nago le mothopo.

slides.title: Mollwane wo o šuthago, 1806-1836

blocks.alt: Tatelano ya dinako ya ditiragalo tša bohlokwa tša mollwane go tloga 1806 go fihla 1836.

events.label: Borithane e tšea taolo ye e tiilego ya Kapa Colony
Maxhosa a rakwa go tloga Zuurveld; Grahamstown e a hlolwa
Makhanda o hlasela Grahamstown; naga ye ntši e a tšewa
Badudi ba Borithane ba fihla mollwaneng
Kgoši Hintsa o bolawa nakong ya Ntwa ya Boselela ya Mollwane
Great Trek e a thoma ge Maburu a tloga colony

slides.notes: Šomiša tatelano ye ya dinako go kopanya. Botšiša barutwana go latela mokgwa go phatša ditiragalo: kgohlano ye nngwe le ye nngwe gantši e fela ka mollwane o kgorometšwa bohlabela le Maxhosa a lahlegelwa ke naga. Ela hloko Great Trek mafelelong, yeo barutwana ba ka e ithutago ka mo latelago - e godile ka karolo go tšwa dikgohlanong tša mollwane le diphetogo tša molao wa bokoloniale.

slides.title: Seo re se ithutilego
slides.lead: Mollwane wa Kapa e be e le lefelo la tirišano le ntwa ka bobedi - kgwebo le lenyalo, eupša gape le ntwa le go amogwa naga.

blocks.text: Mollwaneng wa Kapa Bohlabela, ditšhaba tša Xhosa, ba-trekboer, Khoikhoi, badudi ba Borithane le baromiwa ba kereke ba ile ba **abelana** naga ka kgwebo le bophelo bja letšatši le letšatši, eupša gape ba **lwa** ka naga, dikgomo le maatla. Ntwa ka morago ga ntwa e ile ya fela ka Maxhosa a lahlegelwa ke naga, mola mollwane wa colony o dutše o šutha bohlabela.

blocks.question: Fa mehlala ye mebedi ya tirišano magareng ga dihlopha tše di fapanego mollwaneng wa Kapa.
Hlaloša mabaka a mabedi ao ntwa e ilego ya gola ka wona mollwaneng mathomong a bo-1800.
Kgetha moetapele o tee (Makhanda, Hintsa goba Maqoma) gomme o hlaloše lebaka la ge a gopolwa.

slides.notes: Phetha ka go boela go diripa tše pedi tša sehlogo - tirišano le ntwa - gore barutwana ba kgone go swara ka bobedi monaganong. Šomiša dipotšišo tše tharo e le mošomo wa go ngwala goba poledišano; kabo ya maswai e latela mokgwa wa CAPS wa dikarabo tše dikopana le go ngwala temana. Gopotša barutwana gore histori ye ya mollwane e thuša go hlaloša ditiragalo tša ka morago tša go swana le Great Trek le tahlego ya naga ya Maafrika go ralala Afrika Borwa.
